# wordpress_application_password (Resource)

Manages a WordPress application password for a specific user.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Human-readable name for this application password.
- `user_id` (Number) WordPress user ID that owns the application password.

### Optional

- `app_id` (String) Optional UUID provided by the client application to identify itself.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) GMT timestamp of when the application password was created.
- `id` (String) Terraform resource identifier in the format `user_id:uuid`.
- `last_ip` (String) IP address from the last use, or null if never used.
- `last_used` (String) GMT timestamp of the last use, or null if never used.
- `password` (String, Sensitive) Generated application password. This value is only returned by WordPress when the password is created.
- `uuid` (String) Unique identifier for the application password.
